heading: Mungallala South vs Mungalli — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mungallala South, Queensland and Mungalli, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mungalli has a lower overall climate risk score (24/100) compared to Mungallala South (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mungallala South or Mungalli safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mungallala South has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Mungalli scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mungallala South scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Mungalli scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mungallala South or Mungalli?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mungalli has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
